scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.prisma:setup: npm run prisma:generate --workspace backend && npm run prisma:ensure-tables --workspace backend && npm run prisma:ensure-project-qs-assignments --workspace backend && npm run prisma:ensure-foreign-keys --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.ci: npm run ci:verify && npm run security:check && npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace backend
